items.title: ju_keramia
items.description: A minimalist digital space designed to present handcrafted ceramics in a calm, gallery-like atmosphere. The project blends a visual artist portfolio with the foundations of a lightweight e-commerce experience, built to support product listings, image management, and future ordering features.The site is actively evolving as I shape the structure, refine the layout, and build the image management workflow.Tech: Nuxt 3 • Vue 3 • TailwindCSS • Supabase • Cloudflare R2 • Vercel
